headlines.title: Trump says the U.S. will ‘free up’ ships in the Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: President Trump says the U.S. will start escorting ships through the Strait of Hormuz on Monday, after he didn’t rule out a return to fighting with Iran. The president also told an Israeli media outlet that Iran’s latest peace offer was “not acceptable.” NBC News’ Raf Sanchez has the latest.

headlines.title: Rudy Giuliani in 'critical' condition in hospital, spokesman says
headlines.description: Rudy Giuliani has been hospitalized and is in critical condition, according to his spokesperson, Ted Goodman.“Mayor Rudy Giuliani is currently in the hospital, where he remains in critical but stable condition.

headlines.title: Suspected hantavirus infections leave 3 dead, several ill on a cruise ship in the Atlantic
headlines.description: Three passengers have died and three other people are being treated amid a "public health event" involving suspected hantavirus infections on a cruise ship in the Atlantic Ocean, health officials said

headlines.title: Your complete guide to the 2026 Met Gala
headlines.description: As celebrities prepare to hit the 2026 Met Gala red carpet, learn more about the "costume art" theme, who's coming, what time it starts and more.

headlines.title: Who will own the Bernie Sanders lane in 2028?
headlines.description: The massive grassroots movement that twice rallied behind Bernie Sanders' presidential bids is facing a big question: Who will emerge as its next leader?

headlines.title: A 'Devil Wears Prada 2' meme that viewers thought was AI slop was actually made by a human
headlines.description: What some viewers thought was an AI-generated meme in “The Devil Wears Prada 2” was actually drawn by a human artist

headlines.title: Senator says Trump's actions violates war powers law
headlines.description: Democratic Sen. Adam Schiff of California says that while multiple presidents have not gone to Congress for war authorization in the past, President Trump’s actions are a “clear violation” of the War Powers Act of 1973.

headlines.title: DOJ chief says U.S. not actively at war with Iran
headlines.description: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche reacts to President Trump saying he doesn't use the word "war" when referring to the U.S. conflict with Iran.
